0.description: This Pokémon is holding an item, but its exact identity and effects are currently unknown.

1.description: Held: Rock-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Rock.

2.description: Held: Increases Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

3.description: Held: Increases Special Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

4.description: Held: Holder’s moves inflict 30% extra damage, but cost 10% max HP.

5.description: Held by Zamazenta. Changes form to Crowned Shield. Cannot be knocked off or tricked. Changes Iron Head into Behemoth Bash.

6.description: Held: Ice-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Ice.

7.description: Held: Electric-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

8.description: Held by Ogerpon. Changes form to Hearthflame Mask. Boosts Fire-type moves by 20% and cannot be knocked off. Turns Ivy Cudgel into a Fire-type move.

9.description: Held: Consumed when asleep to cure sleep.

10.description: Held by Zacian. Changes form to Crowned Sword. Cannot be knocked off or tricked. Changes Iron Head into Behemoth Blade.

11.description: Held: Holder’s Super Effective moves do 20% extra damage.

12.description: Held: Water-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Water.

13.description: Held by Palkia. Changes form to Origin Form. Boosts Water-type and Dragon-type moves by 20%.

14.description: Held by Ogerpon. Changes form to Wellspring Mask. Boosts Water-type moves by 20% and cannot be knocked off. Turns Ivy Cudgel into a Water-type move.

15.description: Doubles Pikachu’s Attack and Special Attack. Breed on Pikachu or Raichu: Pichu Egg will have Volt Tackle.

16.description: Held: Poison-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Poison.

17.description: Held: Bug-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Bug.

18.description: Held: Grass-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Grass.

19.description: Held: Flying-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Flying.

20.description: Held: Dark-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Dark.

21.description: Held: Normal-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

22.description: Held: Inflicts Burn on the holder at the end of the turn. Activates after Burn damage would occur.

23.description: Held: Fire-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Fire.

24.description: Held by Giratina. Changes form to Origin Form. Boosts Ghost-type and Dragon-type moves by 20%.

25.description: Held: Raises the holder’s critical hit ratio by one stage.

26.description: Held: Both turns of a two-turn charge move happen at once. Consumed upon use.

27.description: Boosts the damage from Palkia’s Dragon-type and Water-type moves by 20%.

28.description: Held: Increases Speed by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

29.description: Held: Activates Protosynthesis or Quark Drive abilities upon entry. Consumed after use.

30.description: Held: Bug-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage.

31.description: Held: Inflicts Toxic on the holder at the end of the turn. Activates after Poison damage would occur.

32.description: Held: Consumed when a move runs out of PP to restore its PP by 10.

33.description: Held: Multi-hit moves hit more consistently, guaranteeing at least 4 hits for standard 2-5 hit moves.

34.description: Held: Resets all lowered stats to normal at end of turn. Consumed after use.

35.description: Held: When the holder is hit by a super effective move, its Attack and Special Attack raise by two stages.

36.description: Held: Psychic-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Psychic.

37.description: Raises Latias and Latios’s Special Attack and Special Defense by 50%.

38.description: Held by Ogerpon. Changes form to Cornerstone Mask. Boosts Rock-type moves by 20% and cannot be knocked off. Turns Ivy Cudgel into a Rock-type move.

39.description: Held: Holder survives any single-hit attack at 1 HP if at max HP, then the item is consumed.

40.description: Held: The holder is completely immune to all entry hazard damage and effects (Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web).

41.description: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 1/4 max HP.

42.description: Held: Fairy-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Fairy.

43.description: Held: Electric-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Electric.

44.description: Held: When the holder is hit by a contact move, the attacking Pokémon takes 1/6 its max HP in damage.

45.description: Held by Dialga. Changes form to Origin Form. Boosts Steel-type and Dragon-type moves by 20%.

46.description: Raises the holder’s Special Defense to 1.5×.  Prevents the holder from selecting a status move.

47.description: Held: Dragon-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Dragon.

48.description: Held: Fighting-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Fighting.

49.description: Held: Steel-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Steel.

50.description: Held: Ground-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Ground.

51.description: Held: Restores 1/16 (6.25%) holder’s max HP at the end of each turn.

52.description: Held: Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder last 8 rounds instead of 5.

53.description: Held: Ghost-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Ghost.

54.description: Held: Provides a 1/10 (10%) boost in accuracy to the holder.

55.description: Held: Holder has 1.5× Defense and Special Defense, as long as it’s not fully evolved.

56.description: Held: Raises the holder's Special Attack by 1 stage after it uses a sound-based move. Consumed after use.

57.description: Held: Grants immunity to Ground-type moves, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes. Consumed when the holder takes damage from a move.

58.description: Held: Consumed to cure any status condition or confusion.

59.description: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP when using a move to go first.

60.description: This Pokémon is not holding any item. It has no passive item effects.
